posts.text:
When all else fails, blame Biden.


Kate from Kharkiv (@BohuslavskaKate)

Hegseth: "We're still dealing with the environment Joe Biden created—depleting our stockpiles and sending them to Ukraine instead of our own military. Every time we face a challenge, it traces back to 'Well, sent it to Ukraine.'"

It looks like they’re just going to blame Ukraine whenever anything goes wrong now, doesn’t it? It’s depressing to watch because while this administration will eventually leave office, a segment

Trying to shoehorn this “investigation” into the friendliest of pro-Trump jurisdictions, Aileen Cannon’s corner of the Southern District of Florida, tells you everything you need to know about the lack of merit here. Just another abuse of the criminal justice system to harass people Trump considers enemies.


Marc Caputo (@MarcACaputo)

NEWS: James Comey has been subpoenaed in the wide-ranging "grand conspiracy" case against those who had investigated & prosecuted Trump from 2017-2024, @axio

😳


Acyn (@Acyn)

Reporter: Why didn't you tell allies about the war before attacking Iran?

Trump: We wanted it to be a surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2034665671037202476#m

"That number" comes from the conservative Heritage Foundation. So let's say it again, voter fraud isn't the problem. The problem is this administration's efforts to prevent eligible Americans from voting—voter suppression.


The Bulwark (@BulwarkOnline)

Rep. Himes: “How many active investigations does the FBI have into foreign individuals voting in U.S. elections?”

Patel: “We have a number of investigations, generally speaking.”

Himes: “The Heritage Foundation found only 77 instances of non-c
This reporting describes a government by kleptocracy, where bribes & fraud are the norm. If true, fed'l criminal investigations should be underway. nbcnews.com/news/us-news/dhs…

A civil case brought by Epstein survivors may be close to settlement. Tonight we dig into the allegations & why this could be extremely important-& unwanted in the White House-news. Follow the money! open.substack.com/pub/joycev…

This isn't true. Democrats have put bills on the floor to fully fund TSA, FEMA, the Coast Guard, & CISA. Republicans, including Collins, have pushed them aside so they can score cheap political points. She thinks Maine voters aren't smart enough to figure out the truth.


Sen. Susan Collins (@SenatorCollins)

The Democrats’ decision to shut down the Department of Homeland Security has caused chaos at our airports, delayed assistance to communities affected by disasters, and forced thousands

It's not Democrats. These are facts. Democrats are putting bills on the floor to fully fund TSA, FEMA, the Coast Guard, & CISA and the GOP is blocking them.


Blue Georgia (@BlueATLGeorgia)

Angus King: Twice in the last two weeks, Senator Patty Murray put a bill on the floor that would have fully funded TSA, FEMA, CISA, and the Coast Guard for the rest of the year. Inexplicably to me, that bill was blocked by my Republican colleagues.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BlueATLGeorgia/statu

My new piece for @cafedotcom: This is how reproductive rights are lost. We can't let women be relegated to second class status on the civil rights agenda, or everyone suffers. cafe.com/notes-from-contribu…

🍿🍿🍿


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

wow! Rand Paul begins Markwayne Mullin's confirmation hearing by confronting him about comments Mullin made describing Paul as a "freakin' snake" and "celebrating" Paul getting assaulted

"I just wonder if someone who applauds violence against their political opponents is the right person to lead an agency that has struggled to accept limits to the proper use of force"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2034263768738287972#m
A case you may not have read about anywhere else tells Trump, firmly, “No!” when it comes to meritless defamation charges. joycevance.substack.com/p/a-…

This comes from someone who understands how to “follow the money.”


Ron Wyden (@RonWyden)

Stay tuned.



— https://nitter.net/RonWyden/status/2033940187084947471#m
What’s it going to take for people to realize we’ve got Biff Tanner in the White House?

A civil case brought by Epstein survivors may be close to settlement. Tonight we dig into the allegations & why this could be extremely important-& unwanted in the White House-news. Follow the money! open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

My new piece for @cafedotcom: This is how reproductive rights are lost. We can't let women be relegated to second class status on the civil rights agenda, or everyone suffers.

Fed Chair Jerome Powell gets a victory in court. @preetbharara.bsky.social and I discuss a judge’s decision to quash subpoenas in DOJ’s probe on a new episode of @cafedotcom.bsky.social Insider. Listen: cafe.visitlink.me/Qm-B2T

The ruling brought an abrupt halt to the major changes that Mr. Kennedy, who has long been skeptical of vaccines, had set in motion, upending national vaccine policy and making sweeping revisions to the recommendations for what shots are given and when.

The ruling brought an abrupt halt to the major changes that Mr. Kennedy, who has long been skeptical of vaccines, had set in motion, upending national vaccine policy and making sweeping revisions to the recommendations for what shots are given and when.
 www.nytimes.com/2026/03/16/h...
An update on Fulton County and the motion to return ballots and voting records the Trump administration seized. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...
The brave men & women in our military deserve better from the commander in chief.

It’s hard to feel prepared for all the legal news that’s coming at you in a week like this where there is so much of it. Here is my modest effort to help you get there. 

open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

Here’s the highlight reel of last week’s posts and events from my newsletter, Civil Discourse. Grab a cup of coffee and get ready to catch up on anything you may have missed. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

I wrote about this, and what it means for the First Amendment, last night. Get the history & the analysis here: joycevance.substack.com/p/attacking-...

www.nytimes.com/2026/03/14/w...
Glad you feel that way. We really enjoy doing it and it forces us to think critically.

So, Geoff Bennett has a new book, Black Out Loud, & it’s nothing you’re expecting and everything you want to read write now, so I got him to talk with me about it & about what it’s like to be in the anchor chair for NewsHour.

Farmer and retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris, the Georgia Democrat in the runoff to replace MTG in Congress, joins us for coffee Saturday morning. His background makes him a qualified & compelling candidate. Leave your questions for him in the chat and join us! open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

On a Thursday in America…
joycevance.substack.com/p/thursday-i...
I really don’t care…

Today, Justice Barrett said “Freedom of speech & freedom of religion commit us to pluralism. They commit us to tolerance. They…allow to be heard even those viewpoints that we might disagree with.”
So, what does she make of Trump, who lacks that commitment? open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...

When the President decides photojournalists can’t take pictures at Sec’y Hegseth’s Iran briefings, it’s not a small thing. We’re connecting the dots to the larger efforts to erode our 1st Amendment rights, just when we need them the most. open.substack.com/pub/joycevan...
